mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
SELECT p.id FROM leo_${type}_product p WHERE 1=1
AND p.id IN ( SELECT c.product_id FROM leo_${type}_compatibility c WHERE c.compatibility_status = 'V' AND c.post_processing_step IN
#{step}
GROUP BY c.product_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.post_processing_step) = #{stepCount} )
AND (p.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
) tmp

SELECT DISTINCT step_category AS "category", post_processing_step AS "step" FROM ( SELECT step_category, post_processing_step FROM leo_book_board_compatibility UNION ALL SELECT step_category, post_processing_step FROM leo_flat_compatibility UNION ALL SELECT step_category, post_processing_step FROM leo_non_flat_compatibility ) all_steps WHERE step_category IS NOT NULL AND post_processing_step IS NOT NULL ORDER BY step_category, post_processing_step
